projects.name: Mazika
projects.description: A music streaming UI built with React (Vite) and Material UI. Features dynamic search, trending songs, artist pages, a mini player, and a clean, responsive design.

projects.name: Car Zone
projects.description: A full-stack web app for car listings and purchases. Allows users to browse, filter, and add vehicles. Built with React, Node.js, and MongoDB.

projects.name: Personal Finance Tracker
projects.description: A web app to track personal finances, manage expenses, and visualize spending habits. Built with React and Firebase.
